title: Premium Hand Blown Glass Carafe with Wooden Lid – 1.2L Minimalist Water Jug & Wine Decanter, Bamboo Stopper, Elegant Pitcher for Iced Tea, Water, Wine | Unique Luxury Gift | 10.5x28.5cm
features: 1.2L Capacity: Ideal for serving water, wine, iced tea, juice, and more.
Minimalist Elegant Design: Complements modern and classic interiors effortlessly.
Wide Mouth Opening: Easy to add ice cubes and fresh fruit for enhanced flavour.
Versatile Use: Perfect as a water jug, wine decanter, or stylish pitcher for entertaining.
Compact Dimensions: Fits conveniently in most fridge doors (W10.5 x H28.5 cm).
Ideal Gift Choice: Sophisticated present for wine lovers, hosts, and design enthusiasts.
description: Product Description Mindfully Designed for Elevated Living Crafted using ancient mouth-blown techniques, this 1.2L glass carafe combines heritage craftsmanship with modern design. The crystal-clear body and natural bamboo lid create a clean, understated look for any table. Hand-Blown | Minimalist, Elegant & Functional Sustainable Bamboo Lid Natural bamboo stopper adds warmth and is a great alternative to plastic. Multi-Purpose Use Ideal for wine, water, iced tea, or fruit-infused drinks. Perfect Pour Design Wide neck makes filling, pouring, and cleaning effortless.
